description_long: This is a medium-sized, round-bodied teapot with a slightly flattened top and a wide, gently sloping spout. The surface has a hand-crafted, brushed texture with a gradient of muted gray and off-white tones, giving it a rustic, ceramic appearance. The handle is a thick, rounded loop attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, providing a sturdy grip. The lid is present, circular, and slightly domed with a small, rounded knob at the center for easy removal. The spout is moderately long, slightly curved upward, and tapers to a narrow opening. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, and the overall design is utilitarian and simple.
description: A round, rustic gray teapot with a loop handle, domed lid, and gently curved spout. The surface is matte and hand-crafted in appearance.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from a side angle, showing the full length of the spout on the right and the loop handle on the left.
description_view_1: The teapot is viewed head-on from the spout side, with the spout centered and the handle mostly hidden behind the body.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the handle on the right and the spout on the left, with the body’s roundness clearly visible.
description_view_3: The back view shows the handle centered, with the spout hidden and the lid’s knob visible at the top.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is gently curved, angled slightly upward, and positioned at the front of the teapot body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, rounded loop attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, forming a sturdy arch.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; the lid is circular, slightly domed, and features a small central knob.
